creator: mikael@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've just tried on an armv7 board and it also reports correct info:
/usr/ports/sysutils/lscpu/work/stage/usr/local/bin/lscpu 
Architecture:            arm
Byte Order:              Little Endian
Total CPU(s):            4
Model name:              ARM Cortex-A15 r3p3 (ECO: 0x00000000)

I propose to remove ONLY_FOR_ARCH if that's ok for you.
